# Sample Fields Card ## Summary The `SampleFields` card definition provides a set of sample fields that can be used within a consuming card. It serves as a reusable building block for creating more complex card structures. ## Import ```javascript import { SampleFields } from '../sample-fields'; ``` ## Usage as a Field To use the `SampleFields` card as a field within a consuming card, you can include it in the `fields` array of the consuming card's definition: ```javascript import { CardDef, containsMany } from '@cardstack/core'; import { SampleFields } from '../sample-fields'; export class MyCard extends CardDef { fields = [ containsMany(SampleFields, 'sampleFields') ]; } ``` ## Template Usage Inside the consuming card's template, you can display the `SampleFields` card by using the `<@fields.sampleFields />` syntax: ```handlebars

My Card

<@fields.sampleFields />
```
